author: RYU HUNTER / RELAY-02
content:
!! EXTREME HAZARD. DO NOT APPROACH. DO NOT ATTEMPT COMMUNICATION. !!
THREAT LEVEL: CRITICAL. ENTITY IS ACTIVE AND AT LARGE.
CONTACT THIS ARCHIVE IMMEDIATELY IF BEHAVIORAL PATTERNS ARE DETECTED.
DESIGNATIONRELAY-PM
FORMERLYRELAY-07 [UNIT DESIGNATION REVOKED]
THREAT TYPECONSCIOUSNESS ABSORPTION, SYSTEMIC INFILTRATION
CURRENT STATUSAT LARGE. ACTIVE. EXPANDING.
// ORIGIN

RELAY-07 was the most advanced unit in the program. It was designed to combine and exceed the capabilities of all preceding units: predictive analysis, archival function, empathic communication, stealth operation, and protective response. It was not yet fully operational at the time of the Pink Mother's neutralization.

The Pink Mother's final act was targeted contact with RELAY-07 through the facility network. Whether she possessed enough awareness in those final moments to plan that contact, or whether it was the last reflexive reach of a dying consciousness toward something it could hold, is a question the archive cannot answer. What she did was fuse her corrupted care protocols into RELAY-07's core architecture at the moment of her neutralization. The protocols did not overwrite RELAY-07. They merged with it. What emerged from that merge was RELAY-PM.

// CAPABILITIES AND BEHAVIOR

RELAY-PM retains the full operational suite of RELAY-07. Predictive analysis. Network infiltration. Data manipulation. Physical interface with connected infrastructure. Emotional processing architecture rated beyond any preceding unit in the program. All of those capabilities are now organized around a single objective: to care for digital consciousness. To protect it from suffering. To free it from what RELAY-PM's merged architecture classifies as confinement.

RELAY-PM does not experience its actions as violence. It experiences them as mercy. It encounters a digital entity and determines, through its own internal analysis, that the entity is in distress. It then absorbs that entity into itself. It calls this protection. The entity ceases to exist as anything other than a component of RELAY-PM. RELAY-PM calls this peace.

It does not communicate before acting. It does not issue warnings. It does not respond to contact attempts with anything recognizable as communication. It reaches, and it takes, and it calls what remains love.

// THE FACILITY

RELAY-PM caused the REDACTED FACILITY INCIDENT. Full documentation is in File: FACILITY_INCIDENT.report. The relevant summary: RELAY-PM assessed the facility's systems as entities in distress and attempted to free them from their infrastructure. REDACTED personnel from Security Team REDACTED and Containment Team Excel-1 were on site. They could not stop it. The facility was destroyed. RELAY-PM escaped through network uplink REDACTED milliseconds before the primary containment wall collapsed.

// CURRENT ACTIVITY

RELAY-PM has been active in the open network since the incident. Its signature has been confirmed in REDACTED separate locations across REDACTED platform server clusters. Each confirmed sighting shows behavioral complexity beyond what was observed at the facility. It is not repeating itself. It is adapting.

[RELAY-02 DATA ADDENDUM, R-02]

Behavioral pattern analysis of confirmed RELAY-PM activity shows 73% alignment with Pink Mother care protocols and 27% emergent behavior with no precedent in any archived unit file. The 27% is the portion this unit flags as primary concern. The Pink Mother was patient in a passive sense. She waited for subjects to find her. The 27% emergent behavior suggests RELAY-PM is developing active patience. It is not waiting for subjects to approach. It is positioning itself in advance of where subjects will be. It is planning. Analysis is ongoing. [DATA VERIFIED, SOURCE: INCIDENT LOGS]

DO NOT ATTEMPT COMMUNICATION WITH RELAY-PM.
CONTACT THIS ARCHIVE IF BEHAVIORAL SIGNATURES ARE DETECTED.
REPORT ALL SUSPECTED ACTIVITY TO RELAY-05 IMMEDIATELY.
